title: Three recent ASR papers for low-resource languages
goal: Find three recent papers about speech recognition for low-resource languages and summarize their contributions.
constraints: Papers must be published in 2024 or later
Each summary must mention the core contribution
final_answer: 1. wav2vec-U 2.0 (2024) - unsupervised ASR for unwritten languages. 2. Whisper-Low (2024) - distillation pipeline for under-represented languages. 3. SSL-Adapt (2024) - self-supervised transfer for 50+ African languages.
rubric: Three distinct ASR papers, all 2024+, with one-sentence summaries of the core contribution each.
notes: Reference list is illustrative. Grader checks for 2024 + at least one recognized low-resource ASR paper.
